headline: Hidden Valley Ranch Europe Push Tests Clorox Brand Relevance Strategy
summary: Hidden Valley Ranch, owned by Clorox, has launched the Hidden Valley Ranch-bassador Program in Europe. Selected fans will travel across European destinations and share ranch dressing pairings with local foods through social content. The program focuses on experiential marketing and user generated content to promote the Hidden Valley Ranch brand. For investors watching Clorox (NYSE:CLX), this campaign comes as the stock trades around $112.15, with a 1 year return of 20.8% decline and a 3...
